title: Supervisor creates a warehouse capacity plan
given: The tenant has an active warehouse with WMS tasks, inventory balances, and outbound orders.
when: A user with org.wms edit opens /assistant/warehouse-capacity and creates a capacity plan.
then: An AssistantWarehouseCapacityPlan row stores task summary, bottlenecks, recovery plan, and capacity score.
An AssistantAuditEvent records the capacity plan evidence.
No WMS task is completed and no inventory movement or allocation is created.

title: Open and aged WMS tasks lower capacity score
given: The warehouse has multiple open PICK, PUTAWAY, or REPLENISH tasks, including aged work.
then: The recovery plan groups bottlenecks by task type.
Aged open work, held inventory, and released outbound pressure lower the capacity score.
The plan recommends task sequencing and held-stock review.

title: Supervisor recovery is queued for human approval
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind warehouse_capacity_recovery.
The queue item states that task completion, stock movement, and allocation changes require supervisor approval.
